title: Star Wars Legends: Rise of Empire
description: Legends late-Republic and Clone Wars deck covering the Naboo crisis, Separatist crisis, Clone Wars multimedia-era state, Revenge of the Sith transition, Order 66, Jedi Purge, and early Imperial consolidation.
era: Rise of Empire: late Republic, Clone Wars, Order 66, and early Empire
author: Saga

cover.alt: Deck cover for Star Wars Legends: Rise of Empire

continuity.sourceBoundary: Legends Rise of Empire material covering the late Galactic Republic, Naboo crisis, Separatist crisis, Clone Wars-era Legends, Revenge of the Sith transition, Order 66, Jedi Purge, and early Imperial consolidation before the classic Rebellion era.
continuity.notes: Development deck. Keep separate from Disney canon-only Clone Wars and early Empire material unless stacked intentionally. Treat 2008 Clone Wars-era material as compatible only when the user's chosen Legends stack permits it.

curationPass.name: timeline-control-review
curationPass.notes: Removed low-value deck-operation Lorecards, tightened model-facing injections, added Context constraints and anti-lore, and normalized schema-supported lorePurpose values.
